# Circle Community Discussions on AI, UX, Design, Code & Strategy

> A curated listing of Jono Young's most engaging Circle community posts, covering AI and MCP, video and live events, Site Builder, courses, SEO, analytics, content creation, and community engagement.

Author: Jono Young. Focus: Circle community UX, design, code & strategy. Updated: 2026-06-23.

## AI for Circle Communities

- [Turn Videos in AI Training Content](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/how-i-turn-video-into-ai-training-content-for-my-circle-community): Train community AI agents with supplemental video content without uploading the video to Circle, saving time, storage space, and cost.
- [How to Train Your Circle AI Agents](https://community.circle.so/c/build-with-ai/how-to-train-your-circle-ai-agents): Create Claude and ChatGPT project instructions that automatically convert PDFs, slide decks, and documents into Circle AI Agent knowledge snippets, ready to paste as custom knowledge or upload.
- [Connect Google Antigravity to Circle MCP](https://community.circle.so/c/build-with-ai/how-to-connect-google-antigravity-to-circle-mcp): Connect Google Antigravity to the Circle MCP server so it can access community data and perform actions; about a 15-minute setup.

## Video & Live Events

- [Reuse Videos & Live Events in New Posts (Part 2)](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/reuse-videos-you-already-uploaded-part-2): Save storage, time, and money by reusing videos and live event recordings already added to Circle.
- [How to Reuse Videos You Already Uploaded (Part 1)](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/how-to-reuse-video-you-already-uploaded): Step-by-step tutorial for reusing videos and live streams already uploaded to Circle.

## Circle Site Builder Enhancements

- [Building Responsive Hero Sections with Site Builder](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/building-responsive-hero-sections-with-site-builder): The basics of how the new multi-column sections work in Site Builder and how to use device views to tweak your design.
- [Using the New Multi-column Sections in Site Builder](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/using-the-new-multi-column-sections-in-site-builder): Create multi-column sections for Circle Site Builder with custom design and custom content.
- [How to Make FAQs Expand and Collapse in Site Builder](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/how-to-make-faqs-expand-and-collapse-in-site-builder): Fix the FAQ section so questions expand and collapse instead of displaying fully expanded.

## Circle Course Enhancements

- [How to Add Custom Banners to Circle Courses](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/how-to-add-custom-banners-to-circle-courses): Add custom banners above Circle course landing pages using CSS and reusable templates.

## Circle SEO & Discoverability

- [Take Advantage of New Circle SEO Features](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/take-advantage-of-new-circle-seo-features): Overview of Circle's SEO settings and how to use them to improve search visibility.

## Circle Analytics & Member Behavior

- [Understanding the Difference Between "Last Logged In" and Actual User Activity](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/does-last-logged-in-last-time-active): Clarifies how Circle tracks user activity and why "last logged in" can be misleading.

## Content Creation for Your Circle Community

- [Building a Multi-Season Podcast with Circle](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/building-a-multi-season-podcast-with-circle): A 90-second look at building a multi-season podcast that mimics a dedicated podcast platform while keeping Circle's community features.
- [A New Writing Tool to Craft Your Message](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/a-new-writing-tool-to-craft-your-message): A writing workflow using Craft for Mac for creating structured, original Circle posts.

## Circle Community Engagement

- [How to Add an Announcement Banner to Your Community](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/how-to-add-an-announcement-or-alert-banner-to-your-community): Add an announcement or alert banner using custom HTML and CSS, inspired by Circle's Community Recap feature.
- [Say Hello Copy & Paste Button](https://community.circle.so/c/share-and-learn/say-hello-copy-paste-button): Add a copy-and-paste "Say Hello" button to Circle posts to make onboarding easier for new members.
